name: base64decode
description: A lightweight Chrome Manifest V3 extension for decoding selected Base64 text from the context menu.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); ['manifest.json','_locales/en/messages.json','_locales/zh_CN/messages.json'].forEach((file)=>JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8').replace(/^\uFEFF/,''))); console.log('manifest and locales json ok')" && node --check base64.js && node --check background.js
